dir:src.userDescription: Holds the complete Golden Fixture service that checks system health and creates personalized greetings. It bundles the version marker and all the working parts together in one place.

dir:src/golden_app.userDescription: Provides a live service with two main features. It checks if the service is responding and creates friendly greetings from names. The package also tracks which release version is active.

file:src/golden_app/__init__.py.userDescription: Holds the official version marker for the Golden Fixture application. It tells everyone which release they're working with.

file:src/golden_app/app.py.userDescription: Connects people to the service's two main features. It offers a quick status check and turns names into friendly greetings.

file:src/golden_app/core.py.userDescription: Transforms any name into a warm, clean greeting. It ensures every name gets a proper welcome, even when none is provided.

raw-root.userDescription: Provides a simple demo service that checks if systems are running and creates personalized greetings. It bundles everything needed into one ready-to-run package.

sym:src/golden_app/app.py:golden_app.app.userDescription: Sets up the Golden Fixture API with two simple interactions. It provides a quick status check and a personalized greeting feature.
Takes a person's name and returns a friendly welcome message. Names go in, friendly hellos come out.
Offers a simple yes/no indicator that the service is running and ready. Operators can instantly see if everything is working.

sym:src/golden_app/core.py:golden_app.co.userDescription: Transforms any name into a warm, clean greeting. It ensures every name gets a proper welcome, even when none is provided.
